member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Registers services owned by the Blazor presentation host.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.DependencyInjection.AddBlazorPresentation(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds Razor components, component authorization, the API client, and host health checks.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.ApiHealthResponse
member.summary: Represents the API health response displayed by the portal shell.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.ApiHealthResponse.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Represents the API health response displayed by the portal shell.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.ApiHealthResponse.Status
member.summary: The aggregate API health status.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel
member.summary: Contains validated course form values.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.Slug
member.summary: Gets or sets the slug candidate.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.Category
member.summary: Gets or sets the category.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.ThumbnailUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional thumbnail URL.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.InstructorId
member.summary: Gets or sets the administrator-selected instructor.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.RowVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the concurrency value for editing.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.CourseFormModel.FromCourse(LearningPortal.Shared.Courses.CourseResponse)
member.summary: Creates form values from a course response.

member.summary: Contains editable lesson form values.

member.summary: Gets or sets the title.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.LessonFormModel.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description.

member.summary: Gets or sets article Markdown source.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.LessonFormModel.ExternalUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets an external content URL.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.LessonFormModel.Order
member.summary: Gets or sets the order.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.LessonFormModel.EstimatedMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the estimated duration.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.LessonFormModel.LessonType
member.summary: Gets or sets the lesson type.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Models.LessonFormModel.RowVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the concurrency value.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.ApiProblemException
member.summary: Represents a safe RFC 7807 API failure.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.ApiProblemException.#ctor(System.Net.HttpStatusCode,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Represents a safe RFC 7807 API failure.

member.name: P:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.ApiProblemException.ErrorCode
member.summary: Gets the stable API error code when supplied.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation
member.summary: Builds safe local navigation URLs for authentication and authorization outcomes.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation.SignInRoute
member.summary: Gets the existing interactive sign-in route.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation.RegisterRoute
member.summary: Gets the existing interactive registration route.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation.BuildAccessDeniedUrl(System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Builds the access-denied route for the current authentication state.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation.BuildSignInUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a sign-in URL that returns to a validated local portal path.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation.BuildRegisterUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a registration URL that returns to a validated local portal path.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation.ResolveCurrentReturnUrl(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resolves the best local return target for the current page, including an original target carried by the unauthenticated access-denied page.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.AuthenticationNavigation.NormalizeLocalReturnUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a return target to a local root-relative path to prevent open redirects.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.CurrentBearerTokenHandler
member.summary: Forwards the current request's JWT bearer token to Learning Portal API requests.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.CurrentBearerTokenHandler.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IHttpContextAccessor)
member.summary: Forwards the current request's JWT bearer token to Learning Portal API requests.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient
member.summary: Provides typed, asynchronous access to the Learning Portal API.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.HttpClient)
member.summary: Provides typed, asynchronous access to the Learning Portal API.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetHealthAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the API liveness state.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetUsersAsync(LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.GetUsersRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets one filtered, paginated page of administrator-safe users.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.EnableUserAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables one user account.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.DisableUserAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disables one user account.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.AssignUserRoleAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.UserManagement.AssignUserRoleRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds one valid application role to a user.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCoursesAsync(LearningPortal.Shared.Courses.GetCoursesRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets one filtered course page.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCourseByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets one course by identifier.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.CreateCourseAsync(LearningPortal.Shared.Courses.CreateCourseRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a Draft course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.UpdateCourseAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Courses.UpdateCourseRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates a Draft course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.PublishCourseAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a Draft course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.ArchiveCourseAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Archives a Published course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.DeleteCourseAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a Draft course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetLessonsAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Lessons.GetLessonsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a filtered lesson page for a course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetLessonAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets one lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.CreateLessonAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Lessons.CreateLessonRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.UpdateLessonAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Lessons.UpdateLessonRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates a Draft lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.PublishLessonAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.MoveLessonAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Lessons.MoveLessonRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Moves a Draft lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.DeleteLessonAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a Draft lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.PreviewLessonAsync(LearningPortal.Shared.Lessons.LessonContentPreviewRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Builds a non-persisted safe lesson preview.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCatalogAsync(LearningPortal.Shared.Enrollments.GetCatalogRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the published employee course catalog.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCatalogCourseAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets published course details.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.EnrollAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enrolls the current employee in a course.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.WithdrawAsync(System.Guid,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Withdraws an enrollment using optimistic concurrency.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetMyEnrollmentsAsync(LearningPortal.Shared.Enrollments.GetEnrollmentsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the current employee's enrollments.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetEnrollmentAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an authorized enrollment.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCourseEnrollmentsAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Enrollments.GetEnrollmentsRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an authorized course enrollment page.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetLessonPlayerAsync(System.String,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets learner-safe lesson player data.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.AccessLessonAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Records learner access to a lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.CompleteLessonAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Completes a lesson idempotently.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetContinueLearningAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resolves the learner's next appropriate lesson.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCourseQuizzesAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets quizzes for course administration.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetQuizAdministrationAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an editable quiz graph.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.CreateQuizAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Quizzes.SaveQuizRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a draft quiz.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.UpdateQuizAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Quizzes.SaveQuizRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates draft quiz details.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.AddQuizQuestionAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Quizzes.SaveQuizQuestionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a validated question and its answer choices.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.UpdateQuizQuestionAsync(System.Guid,System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Quizzes.SaveQuizQuestionRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates a draft question and its answer-choice graph.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.PublishQuizAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a valid draft quiz.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.ArchiveQuizAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Archives a published quiz.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetQuizAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets learner-safe quiz content without correctness flags.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.StartQuizAttemptAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts or resumes the single active attempt.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.SubmitQuizAttemptAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.Quizzes.SubmitQuizAttemptRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Submits learner selections for server scoring.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetQuizAttemptAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an owned attempt or result.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetMyQuizAttemptsAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the current learner's attempt history.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetMyInstructorEligibilityAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the signed-in user's skill qualifications.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetUserInstructorEligibilityAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets administrator-visible eligibility for a user.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetSkillsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets active skills.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetEligibleInstructorsAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets enabled eligible instructors for one skill.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.RecalculateInstructorEligibilityAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Recalculates a user's qualifications from submitted attempts.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.AssignCourseInstructorAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.InstructorEligibility.AssignCourseInstructorRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Assigns an eligible instructor to a matching course skill.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.StartAiTutorConversationAsync(LearningPortal.Shared.AiTutor.StartAiTutorConversationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Starts a learner-owned AI Tutor conversation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCourseQuizzesForLearnerAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets published quizzes visible to the current enrolled learner.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetMyAiTutorConversationsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the signed-in learner's AI Tutor conversations.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetAiTutorConversationAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets one learner-owned AI Tutor conversation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.SendAiTutorMessageAsync(System.Guid,LearningPortal.Shared.AiTutor.SendAiTutorMessageRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a question to the local AI Tutor.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.ArchiveAiTutorConversationAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Archives a learner-owned AI Tutor conversation.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetOllamaHealthAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets administrator-visible local Ollama health.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.LearningPortalApiClient.GetCurrentUserAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the safe profile for the authenticated user.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalAuthenticationEndpoints
member.summary: Maps the browser-facing cookie bridge to the existing authentication API.

member.name: F:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalAuthenticationEndpoints.ApiClientName
member.summary: Gets the named client used only for anonymous authentication calls.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalAuthenticationEndpoints.MapPortalAuthenticationEndpoints(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Routing.IEndpointRouteBuilder)
member.summary: Maps browser sign-in using the existing API login operation.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalCookieAuthenticationEvents
member.summary: Restores browser sessions by rotating expiring API access tokens.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalCookieAuthenticationEvents.#ctor(LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalSessionRefreshCoordinator)
member.summary: Restores browser sessions by rotating expiring API access tokens.

member.name: T:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalSessionRefreshCoordinator
member.summary: Coalesces concurrent browser refresh-token rotations.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalSessionRefreshCoordinator.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory)
member.summary: Coalesces concurrent browser refresh-token rotations.

member.name: M:LearningPortal.Blazor.Services.PortalSessionRefreshCoordinator.RefreshAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Refreshes one browser session without rotating the same token concurrently.

member.summary: Gets or sets the course status.

member.summary: Gets or sets the course being edited.

member.summary: Gets or sets the non-sensitive redirect reason.

member.summary: Gets or sets the original local page requested by the guest.

member.summary: Gets or sets the content displayed inside the card.

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Provides a public entry point for integration-test hosting.
